discrepancy_analysis:
A. REPORTED RESULT: From Supp Fig 14 xenograft table, 0/4 (0%) of HSC1λ-gGFP control cell injections formed tumors.

B. MODEL RESULT: DATA_UNAVAILABLE — the xenograft tumor formation table referenced in Supplementary Figure 14 is not present in the deposited source data (MOESM10).

C. DISCREPANCY TYPE: UNABLE_TO_EVALUATE. The reported value cannot be independently verified from the provided source data because the underlying xenograft table was not deposited in the supplementary materials available to the reproducer.

D. ROOT CAUSE INVESTIGATION: The source data file MOESM10 does not contain the xenograft results table for Supp Fig 14. The HSC1λ-gGFP control injection outcomes (tumor formation counts per injection replicate) were not included in the supplementary source data deposit. This is a data deposition gap — the figure was published but the underlying counts table was not archived.

E. CLASSIFICATION: 7:MISSING_DATA_HANDLING. The tumor formation table for the xenograft experiment is absent from the source data, preventing reproduction of the reported 0/4 (0%) value.

F. PROPOSED FIX: Request the original xenograft tumor formation table from the authors or locate an alternative source (e.g., embedded within the supplementary figure PDF annotations, a separate supplementary table, or the methods section text). If 0/4 is reported directly in the figure caption or main text, extract that value directly rather than recomputing from source data.

G. CONFIDENCE: HIGH that the data is unavailable in the deposited source files; cannot verify the reported 0/4 (0%) value without the underlying table.
proposed_fix: Obtain the xenograft tumor formation table from the authors or extract the 0/4 (0%) value directly from the figure caption/main text if reported there, since the underlying per-injection counts are not in the deposited MOESM10 source data.
